# SEBA

> AI & digital consulting for the Gulf healthcare market. SEBA builds Arabic-first clinical AI tools, supports MENA market entry, and provides strategic advisory to hospitals, governments, and healthtech companies.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of SEBA's services, team, process, and approach to AI in Gulf healthcare.
- [Solutions](/solutions): Three Arabic-first clinical AI platforms in development — mental health assessment, emergency response, and patient navigation.
- [Contact](/contact-us): Get in touch with the SEBA team.
